title: Where's Esme Hiding?
synopsis: Little Esme plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout their cozy home. Each page features a different hiding spot and family member, building anticipation with repeated sounds and phrases before the joyful reveal of 'Peek-a-boo!'

pages.text: Where's Esme hiding? Shh, shh, shh...

illustration.description: A cozy living room with soft cream and peach tones. Esme, a toddler with warm brown skin, dark curly hair in small puffs, and bright brown eyes, peeks from behind a sage green armchair. Her small hands grip the chair's edge, and she has a mischievous smile. The room has simple, rounded furniture and warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Esme hiding behind a green armchair in a warm living room

illustration.description: Esme's mama, a woman with deep brown skin and natural hair in a low bun, kneels with arms outstretched and a radiant smile. Esme runs toward her with pure joy, arms wide open. The background features soft yellow walls and a plush rug in muted coral tones. Both figures have large, expressive eyes full of love.
illustration.alt: Mama and Esme embracing joyfully with big smiles

pages.text: Where's Esme hiding? Shh, shh, shh...

illustration.description: A sunny kitchen with pale yellow cabinets and white countertops. Esme crouches behind a wooden dining chair, her little feet visible underneath. Her papa, a man with olive skin and short dark hair, stands nearby pretending to look confused. Soft morning light streams through a window, creating gentle shadows.
illustration.alt: Esme hiding behind a kitchen chair while papa searches

illustration.description: Papa scoops up Esme in his arms, both laughing with pure delight. Papa wears a soft blue shirt and has kind brown eyes and a gentle smile. Esme's arms are wrapped around his neck, her face glowing with happiness. The kitchen background shows warm wood tones and potted herbs on the windowsill.
illustration.alt: Papa lifting Esme up in the kitchen, both laughing happily

pages.text: Where's Esme hiding? Shh, shh, shh...

illustration.description: Esme's bedroom with soft lavender walls and white furniture. A colorful patchwork quilt covers the toddler bed. Esme hides under the quilt with just her small hand visible at the edge. Grandma, an elderly woman with silver-gray hair and warm smile lines, sits on the bed looking around playfully.
illustration.alt: Esme hiding under a colorful quilt while grandma sits nearby

illustration.description: Grandma gently pulls back the quilt to reveal Esme's giggling face. Grandma has kind hazel eyes behind wire-rimmed glasses and wears a soft pink cardigan. Esme's face is bright with laughter, her curly hair slightly messy from hiding. Soft toys and books create a cozy atmosphere in the background.
illustration.alt: Grandma discovering Esme under the quilt, both smiling warmly

pages.text: Where's Esme hiding? Shh, shh, shh...

illustration.description: The family garden with blooming flowers in soft pastels. Esme crouches behind a large sunflower, her bright yellow dress blending with the petals. Her big brother, a boy with curly hair like hers but longer, searches among the flower beds. Butterflies flutter overhead in the gentle afternoon light.
illustration.alt: Esme hiding behind a sunflower in the garden while brother looks for her

illustration.description: Brother kneels down to Esme's height as she emerges from behind the sunflower, both children beaming with joy. He has the same warm brown skin and bright eyes as Esme, wearing a light green t-shirt. Garden flowers in soft pinks and yellows frame them, with a gentle blue sky in the background.
illustration.alt: Brother and Esme playing together happily in the flower garden

illustration.description: The whole family gathered in the living room playing peek-a-boo together. Mama, papa, grandma, and brother all have their hands over their eyes while Esme stands in the center, clapping with delight. The room glows with warm golden light, and everyone's faces show pure happiness and love. Soft throw pillows and a cozy atmosphere complete the scene.
illustration.alt: The entire family playing peek-a-boo together in the living room

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who finds Esme first in the story?
questions.explanation: Mama is the first person to find Esme when she's hiding behind the chair.

questions.question: Where does Esme hide in her bedroom?
questions.explanation: Esme hides under the colorful quilt on her bed when Grandma is looking for her.

questions.question: What flower does Esme hide behind in the garden?
questions.explanation: Esme hides behind a big yellow sunflower when playing with her brother in the garden.
